title: Breadcrumb: never lose what you've learned online
description: Save highlights from any web page and search everything you learn — with private, on-device AI.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for Breadcrumb
privacy.description: How Breadcrumb handles your data. Local only, no accounts, no cloud. Notes and searches never leave your device.

terms.title: Terms of Service for Breadcrumb
terms.description: Terms for using the Breadcrumb Chrome extension. Free software from Yanovian LLC.
